zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophia of Werle於1295年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林帕希姆時，她的父親Nicholas II Lord of Werle11292歲，母親Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark20歲。她於大約1315年與Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1339年12月14日之後在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 雷斯包-可額爾德雷斯包格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophia of Werle于1295年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 梅可倫波-史維林帕希姆时，她的父亲Nicholas II Lord of Werle11292岁，母亲Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark20岁。她于大约1315年与Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1339年12月14日之后在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 雷斯包-可額爾德雷斯包格。

nameMeanings.name: Sophia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Werle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sophia of Werle was born in 1295, in Parchim, Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germany, her father, Nicholas II Lord of Werle, was 11292 and her mother, Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark, was 20. She married Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg about 1315. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 14 December 1339, in Rendsburg, Rendsburg-Eckernförde, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophia of Werle est née en 1295, à Parchim, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Allemagne, son père, Nicholas II Lord of Werle, avait 11292 ans et sa mère, Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg environ 1315. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 14 décembre 1339, à Rendsburg, Kreis Rendsburg-Eckernförde, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophia of Werle 1295 in Parchim, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas II Lord of Werle 11292 und ihre Mutter Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark 20. Sie hat um 1315 Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 14. Dezember 1339 in Rendsburg, Kreis Rendsburg-Eckernförde, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia of Werle è nata il nel 1295 nel Parchim, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Germania, sua padre, Nicholas II Lord of Werle, aveva 11292 anni e sua madre, Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg circa 1315. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 14 dicembre 1339, nel Rendsburg, Kreis Rendsburg-Eckernförde, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophia of Werleが1295年にドイツフレイスタアト メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンパーチムで生まれた時，父Nicholas II Lord of Werleは11292歳，母Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmarkは20歳であった。約1315年にGerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1339年12月14日以後にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス レンドスブルグ-エッカーンフoルドレンドスブルグで死去した。

ko.Gottorp Castle,Slesvig,Slesvig-Holstein,: 독일 프레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그 슐레스위그
ko.lifeSummary: Sophia of Werle(이)가 1295년 독일 프레이스타앳 클렌버그-슈워인 파르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas II Lord of Werle(은)는 11292세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1315년 Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1339년 12월 14일 이후 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 렌드스버그-커프o르드 렌드스버그에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophia of Werle nasceu em 1295, em Parchim, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemanha, seu pai, Nicholas II Lord of Werle, tinha 11292 anos e sua mãe, Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg aproximadamente 1315. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 14 de dezembro de 1339, em Rendsburg, Kreis Rendsburg-Eckernförde, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha.

ru.Gottorp Castle,Slesvig,Slesvig-Holstein,: щлесвиг, крис щлесвиг, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophia of Werle родилась в 1295 г. в местности парчим, фристаат меккленбург-щвирин, Германия, её отцу по имени Nicholas II Lord of Werle было 11292 года, а матери, которую звали Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg около 1315 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 14 декабрь 1339 г. в местности рендсбург, крис рендсбург-еккирнфoрд, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophia of Werle nació en 1295, en Parchim, Freistaat Mecklenburg-Schwerin, Alemania, su papá, Nicholas II Lord of Werle, tenía 11292 años y su mamá, Richiza Eriksdatter of Denmark, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Gerhard III of Holstein-Rendsburg aproximadamente 1315. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 14 de diciembre de 1339, en Rendsburg, Kreis Rendsburg-Eckernförde, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania.
